<?php namespace Laravel\Pail\ValueObjects\Origin; class Queue { /** * Creates a new instance of the console origin. */ public function __construct( public string $queue, public string $job, public ?string $command, ) { // } /** * Creates a new instance of the queue origin from the given json string. * * @param array{queue: string, job: string, command: ?string} $array */ public static function fromArray(array $array): static { [ 'queue' => $queue, 'job' => $job, 'command' => $command, ] = $array; return new static($queue, $job, $command); } }
